subcodes.first_line: O noble scion of the blessed Tree! Thy recent letter was as honey and milk in its contents, and was a luminous book and proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فرع محمود شجره مبارکه نامه اخیر را مضمون شهد و شیر و کتاب منیر بود و دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
